title: Copy Assets Executor
description: Copies assets to the output directory.

assets.description: List of files and globs to copy to the output directory.

glob.description: Glob pattern to match files within the input directory.

output.description: The output path relative to the project's output directory.

ignore.description: List of glob patterns to exclude from copying.

includeIgnoredFiles.description: Whether to include files that are gitignored.

outputPath.description: The output path for copied assets, relative to the project root.
